name: mostParamSetStringEnc
title: mostParamSetStringEnc
syntax: long mostParamSetStringEnc (mostAmsMessage msg, char paramAdr[], long encoding, char asciiStr[]); // form 1
long mostParamSetStringEnc (mostAmsMessage msg, char paramAdr[], long arrayIndex, long encoding, char asciiStr[]); // form 2
description: Encoding and setting of parameters of the String type (for ASCII-coded strings only) in an AMS message using the parameter name from the XML function catalog. Only ASCII-coded strings are supported.

parameters.name: msg
parameters.description: Message in which the parameter value should be described.

parameters.name: paramAdr
parameters.description: Identification of parameters (see Symbolic Identification of Parameters).

parameters.name: arrayIndex
parameters.description: Parameter index in arrays or sequences. This declaration overwrites the indexing in the brackets of <paramAdr>.

parameters.name: asciiStr
parameters.description: String that should be encoded and copied to the message.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
